message:
fix(tests): correct boundary values and context flags in unit tests

- forbidden_dep_guards: mark test violation helper as in_test_context=true
  so DG-01 guard doesn't incorrectly block it during test evaluation
- robot_idempotency: fix evict_expired boundary from 1301 to 1300 to
  correctly test the exact TTL expiry boundary (age == TTL is NOT expired)
- swarm_command_center: fix UpdateThrottle test timestamps; first call
  must be at t >= min_interval since last_update_ms initializes to 0,
  shifted from 0/50/100 to 1000/1050/1100

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
